extraction.one_line_summary: BENOOT Tiesj attacked with 3km to go after KRAGH ANDERSEN and ARNDT set tempo, winning by 28 seconds while SCHACHMANN crashed in final kilometer but retained yellow.
tactical_patterns: BENOOT used KRAGH ANDERSEN and ARNDT as domestiques in breakaway to launch stage-winning move at 3km remaining.
Sunweb planted ARNDT in break specifically to wait for KRAGH ANDERSEN, creating numerical advantage for GC ambush.
EDET collected KOM points methodically to move within 4 points of leader, ignoring intermediate sprint entirely.
MATTHEWS sprinted for second place to maximize bonus seconds and team placement after BENOOT went clear.

rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: attacked with 3km remaining and sustained 28-second advantage, exceptional time trial effort in hilly finale
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: positive: bridged to break specifically to support BENOOT, sacrificed stage win for team GC gain of 50 seconds
rider_signals.ARNDT Nikias: positive: infiltrated break early then waited for KRAGH ANDERSEN, perfect domestique execution in breakaway tactics
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: crashed in final kilometer due to overcooking corner, lost 40 seconds but retained yellow by 18 seconds
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: sprinted for second to secure bonus seconds and moved to fifth overall, strong debut performance with Sunweb
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: dropped when KRAGH ANDERSEN arrived in break, unable to hold wheel when tempo increased
rider_signals.EDET Nicolas: positive: targeted KOM points exclusively, moved to second in classification just 4 points behind with strategic breakaway placement
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: neutral: attacked for intermediate sprint bonuses, moved to 1:05 deficit but tactical aggression yielded minimal gains
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: dropped from break on climb despite world champion status, unable to sustain pace with leaders
rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: negative: distanced early from strong breakaway, surprising weakness for time trial specialist on rolling terrain
